channel.title: Project Laguna on CEDIS
channel.description: Recent content in Project Laguna on CEDIS

item.title: Laguna Project
item.description: This project aims to extend the massive processing of a data lake using a cloud architecture, utilizing Amazon Web Services (AWS) as the provider.

item.title: People
item.description: Adjunct Professor at the University of Brasília (UnB), working in the Software Engineering undergraduate program with a focus on parallel computing, high-performance computing, GPU, cloud computing, and bioinformatics.

item.title: Publications
item.description: Conference by CARVALHO SEGUNDO, WASHINGTON LUÍS RIBEIRO DE, CANTO, FABIO LORENSI DO, PINTO, ADILSON LUIZ, SUNDFELD, Daniel Lima (2024).

item.title: Publications
item.description: Conference by NEUBERT, PATRICIA DA SILVA, CANTO, FÁBIOLORENSI DO, PINTO, ADILSON LUIZ, LIMA, Daniel Sundfeld, SILVA, FLÁVIO ROBERTO CRUZ (2024).
